# Plan: Fixture — 32 AC split plan

## Overview

Fixture plan with exactly 32 positive Acceptance Criteria. Used to verify
the partition branch: AC_COUNT >= 30 triggers two ac-evaluator invocations.
Part-1 covers AC-1..AC-16; part-2 covers AC-17..AC-32. The union of their
AC verdicts must cover {AC-1, ..., AC-32} exactly once each (Negative AC-3:
disjoint partitions). Reports are persisted as eval-round-1-part-1.md and
eval-round-1-part-2.md.

## Affected files

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `tests/fixtures/ac-count-plans/plan-32ac.md` | fixture — no source changes |
